subcodes.first_line: The Book from before the Wronged One unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, that the Most Great Joy may take hold of him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لیاخذه الفرح الاعظم من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @justice and wrath of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
